_meta.description: Auto-generated silver evaluation set for NHS Shetland Annual Report 2023/24. Answers produced by the pipeline (retrieval + Ollama generation) and filtered to generation_confidence=1.0. NOT human-verified.

queries.question: What was the total net expenditure for NHS Shetland in 2023/24?
